author: w3Lb
content: Plan: rewrite the semver job in ci.yml — drop the pull_request-only gate (vacuous for a direct-push workflow) and the --baseline-rev origin/main (self-comparison on main), let cargo-semver-checks default to the highest published crates.io version as baseline, and matrix over the four published library crates (ripsed-core, ripsed-fs, ripsed-json, ripsed; ripsed-cli is a binary, nothing to check). Remove continue-on-error — a gate that can't fail isn't a gate; relax later only if crates.io flakes prove real. Drop fetch-depth:0 (only needed for the git baseline). Validate the exact command locally against published 0.3.1 before committing.
